---
title: "Margaret Wilcox"
---

## Margaret Wilcox

**Dates:** (1836-1887)

### Description

cousin of Lewis Carroll

### Biography

Margaret Wilcox was the daughter of William Wilcox (1813-1872), Collector of Customs, and his wife Mary Anne Marwood (1813-1870), half-sister of the Rev. Charles Dodgson (1800-1868), father of Lewis Carroll.

They lived at Whitburn, Northumberland, near CMY\'s friends the Harrisons.  There were 14 children, of which she was the third.

### Letters

- Letter from March 25th [1893]
- Letter from June 1st [?1886]
- Letter from June 7th 1882
- Letter from March 16th [1869]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
